metadata.implementation_contract: predictive_arm=R0 returns to the published BoundaryAtlasModel path before predictor construction, calibration, transition logging, forecast rollout, or predictive policy code runs.
metadata.mode: engineering equivalence; not a scientific outcome

outcome_branches.FAIL: Any missing row or field mismatch; stop line-11 phase 1 and report, do not silently fix.
outcome_branches.INCONCLUSIVE: Only for harness/prereg infrastructure failure before an engineering comparison is possible.
outcome_branches.PASS: All selected headline rows exactly equal the committed J-G1 snapshot; proceed to J-N8/J-N8b preregistration drafts.

metadata.question: Do predictive-referee neutral defaults exactly preserve committed J-G1 headline summary cells?
metadata.what_was_not_shown: This gate does not evaluate PO/PD/PR/PW or scientific predictive-referee hypotheses.

threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Engineering equivalence intentionally reuses the committed J-G1 deterministic seed block 16000-16079 to compare the same headline cells; this is not the new J-N8/J-N8b scientific seed block.
